parsing_res_list.block_content:
Scientific Conference (cozcare members) Monday, March 26, 2012 - 10:00 - 17:55 GMT | Room 1.31 Royal School of Mines
TimeSpeaker
10:00Reception and Registration
10:30Opening and WelcomeSevket Durucan (Imperial College)
Regulatory Session Chairperson: Claus Otto (Shell)
10:40-11:00Review of the international regulatory requirements on CO, geological storage and site abandonmentAnna Korre (Imperial College)
11:00-11:40"Implementation of EU Directive 2009/31/EC on the Geological Storage of Carbon Dioxide" Presentations by representatives of the National Authorities
11:00-11:20Italy: ISPRA – Insituto Superiore per la Protezione e la Riccera Ambientale(ISPRA) Domenico Gaudioso
11:20-11:40The Netherlands: TNO - Geological Survey of the Netherlands(TNO) Jaap N. Breunese
Recent Developments at Project Sites Chairperson: Claus Otto (Shell)
11:40-12:20Presentations by CO2CARE industry partners and site operators providing an overview of recent activities at each project site: K12-B SleipnerVincent Vandeweijer (TNO) Rudolf Held (Statoil)
12:20-13:45Lunch breakSherfield Building
